notes: HF max_position_embeddings is 131072 for the local LlamaConfig.
This stage validated single-layer prefill at batch 32 for seq_len 1, 4, and 8 only; downstream stages must extend validation before claiming long-context readiness.
The supplied forge graph is decode-shaped around a cached length of 128; this functional decoder translates the layer math into prefill and deliberately does not implement decode or paged KV.

.agents/scripts/check_context_contract.py currently treats any below-HF context as a failure unless DRAM-limited; this stage is below advertised because validation scope is short prefill, not because of a proven DRAM limit.
